title: Der Engel mit der Posaune
writer: Ernst Lothar, Karl Hartl, Franz Tassié
actors: Paula Wessely, Helene Thimig, Hedwig Bleibtreu
plot: A long time-span of Austrian history (from the late 19th century to the years after world war II) is reflected in the ups and downs of a family of piano-makers in Vienna.
